scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace frontend" "cargo run --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace frontend && cargo build --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml
scripts.verify: npm run test:all && npm run build
scripts.docker:prep: npm run build && cargo build --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml --release
scripts.docker:build: npm run docker:prep && docker build -t hr-system .
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
